paper.title: Influence of manufactured sand characteristics on strength and abrasion resistance of pavement cement concrete
paper.authors: Li Beixing; Ke Guoju; Zhou Mingkai
paper.material_system: pavement cement concrete with manufactured sand

Box 430070, Wuhan, Chi na article info Article history: Received 23 July 2010 Received in revised form 10 March 2011 Accepted 11 April 2011 Available online 17 May 2011 Keywords: Pavement cement concrete Manufactured sand Partic
Figure 4 shows influence of crushing value of sand on compressive strength of concrete at 28 days; packet text exposes only plotted labels, not complete values.

review_queue.question: Digitize or inspect the source figure/table to recover mixture-level compressive-strength values.
review_queue.suggested_action: Open the PDF page images and extract numeric strength values only if mixture labels, age, unit, and values can be confirmed.

main_risks: Compressive-strength values are not directly readable from packet text.
